physiology.description: v12 implements real NASA crew physiology tracking and health hazards

bone_muscle_physics.fracture_risk: Increased with bone density <70% of baseline

circadian_physics.sol_length: 24.65 hours (37 minutes longer than Earth day)
circadian_physics.sleep_disruption: Accumulates over mission duration without countermeasures
circadian_physics.cognitive_impact: Performance degradation and error rate increase

data_sources: NASA OCHMO Technical Brief: Bone Loss (NASA/TB-2022-030)
